summary.description: 1000-step exploratory run for AMC (early-stopped at step 190). Two attempts: max_completion_length=64 (v5) and max_completion_length=96 (v7). Both terminated at step 190 with near-zero reward improvement.

max_completion_length.rationale: 64-token run (v5) yielded near-zero reward; 96-token run (v7) showed identical pattern

exclusion.criterion_triggered: reward = 0 for > 80% of rollouts sustained through step 190

notes: Exploratory run — max_completion_length deviated from v1.3 registered value of 256.
v5 run (64-token): best reward 0.1125 @ step 10, early-stopped at step 190.
v7 run (96-token): best reward 0.1250 @ step 10, early-stopped at step 190.
Pattern identical across both token lengths — root cause is task difficulty, not truncation.
AMC (kaggle-aimo/amc_filtered) appears too hard for Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct to produce consistent reward signal.
